generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are actually benefiting more from our defense commitments than we are? While we're spending billions to maintain peace, some countries are cutting their own defense budgets. It's time we focus on securing our own borders and civil liberties first. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
